top_items.title: GitHub’s Ex-CEO Just Raised $60M to Replace GitHub (And He Might Be Right)
top_items.one_liner: Former GitHub CEO raises $60M to build a new platform that could challenge GitHub's dominance.

top_items.title: OpenClaw Was Never Ready for Production. NVIDIA’s NemoClaw Changes That
top_items.one_liner: NVIDIA's NemoClaw is presented as a production-ready alternative to OpenClaw for AI assistants.

top_items.title: Why CLIs Beat MCP for AI Agents — And How to Build Your Own CLI Army.
top_items.one_liner: Argues that CLIs are superior to MCP for building AI agents, advocating for Bash over previous approaches.
